code:
import io
import string

fn factorial(_ n: Int) -> Int
  if n <= 1
    1
  else
    n * factorial(n - 1)
  end
end

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    return Err("no input")
  end
  let trimmed = string.trim(line)
  let n = match string.parse_int(trimmed)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    return Err("invalid integer")
  end
  let result = factorial(n)
  print("#{n}!=#{result}")
  Ok(())
end
